About Me

Strategy meets execution,
grounded in data.

I'm an aspiring Associate Product Manager with 6+ years in enterprise IT at HCLTech and Tata Consultancy Services, where I worked at the intersection of data, systems, and user experience — managing deployments for 20,000+ devices and driving Digital Employee Experience improvements through Nexthink analytics.

I completed Airtribe's AI-First Product Management Program in 2026, where I built end-to-end PM case studies across consumer internet, marketplace, and discovery domains — going from user research and problem framing all the way to metrics design, RICE prioritisation, and live prototypes.

My edge is the ability to bridge technical depth and product thinking: I understand systems, I know how to work with data, and I build products with real user empathy at the core.

PM Projects

Case studies built end-to-end.

Capstone · Marketplace Strategy

TM Café — TrulyMadly Expert Marketplace

₹78 Cr
Projected annual run rate at Month 18
  • 18-month strategy to scale paying MAU from <2% to 15%, with a 5-stage monetisation flywheel and 46:1 LTV:CAC ratio
  • 50 simulated user interviews across 4 personas; competitive benchmarking vs. Astrotalk (₹1,210 Cr), YourDost, BetterHelp
  • Prioritised 15 solutions via RICE; built 9-screen Lovable prototype covering emotional trigger to Day-4 retention

Growth Strategy · Retention

Zomato CY2026 Tier-1 Growth Strategy

42% → 60%
90-day retention target
  • Shifted strategy from discount-led acquisition to habit formation — NSM: Monthly Active Transacting Users
  • Designed 4 initiatives: AI personalisation, smart reorder, predictive delivery reliability, Loyalty 2.0
  • Funnel analysis identifying drop-offs at menu→cart and cart→checkout; proposed 1-click UPI and 48-hour reorder nudges
Strategy · OKRs · Cohort Analysis
User Research · Prioritisation

Meesho User Growth & Retention

175M
Annual transacting users studied
  • Diagnosed ARPU constraints and ~60% first-time churn driven by quality mistrust, logistics friction, weak personalisation
  • Built 4-segment user model and 3 personas; ideated 6 solutions including Quality Match Guarantee and Smart Bundle Builder
  • RICE prioritisation surfaced top 3 solutions mapped to ARPU lift and repeat-rate improvement
RICE · Segmentation · ARPU
Product Discovery · Market Sizing

Zepto Pet Salon — Market Research

₹3–5 Cr
Projected Year-1 revenue
  • Evaluated mobile pet grooming opportunity in a $414M Indian market; bottom-up sizing across 8 Tier-1 cities (TAM ~850K)
  • 10+ user interviews across dog, cat, senior-pet, and multi-pet households; competitive moat vs. Urban Company, HUFT
  • Proposed 3 research-led ideas: Pet Van Live Preview (AR trust), Society Groom Slots, Senior Pet Gentle Mode
TAM/SAM · User Interviews · Discovery
Growth Funnel · Prioritisation

Twitter (X) — AARRR Growth Strategy

RICE 108
Top-scored initiative: Feed Bootstrapping
  • Mapped full AARRR funnel — identified gaps at Activation (weak onboarding) and Referral (external virality uncaptured)
  • Defined 3 product epics: Interest-Based Feed Bootstrapping, Conversation Starter Prompts, Viral Tweet Conversion Engine
  • RICE prioritisation with Reach/Impact/Confidence scoring; recommended activation-first sequencing for long-term retention
AARRR · Epics · RICE
Visual PRD · Gamification

StayFit+ — Gamification & Community Retention

+25%
Target session frequency increase
  • Diagnosed 40% WAU drop in 14 days and sessions/week declining 3.2 → 1.4 post onboarding
  • Designed gamification layer (points, streaks, leaderboards, rewards) and community challenge flows (7/30-day, team mode)
  • Delivered as a Visual PRD with wireframes, 12-week timeline, and success metrics: +20% 30-day retention, 50% challenge participation
Visual PRD · Wireframes · Retention
